violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Baked potatoes in the walk-in cooler and gravy in the reach-in cooler were found without date markings. Potentially hazardous food items should be date marked so proper disposition can occur.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the microwave and the cart it is on were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observed food employee handling clean dishes without first washing his hands. Hands should be washed before handling clean dishes.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Attachments to walls and ceilings (e.g. light fixtures, vent covers, decorations etc..) were not cleanable and/or maintained in good repair. Ceiling tiles near the vents were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Fruits and vegetables washed, handling, sink provided (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
